frames.setting: Black-and-white archival footage of mid-20th century New York City; iconic skyline shots, crowds of people, political rallies, street scenes, and speeches
visual_elements: Archival footage of Fiorello La Guardia and Robert F. Wagner (labeled with name chyrons)
White subtitle captions overlaid on archival footage
Dramatic civic imagery: marches, parades, storefronts
frames.presentation_style: Historical montage with narration captions; invokes legacy of past NYC mayors to frame current political moment; cinematic and inspirational tone

frames.setting: Color campaign footage: outdoor street events, rallies, and crowd scenes; candidate greeting supporters; campaign signs visible; urban NYC settings at night and day
visual_elements: Campaign buttons and signs with candidate's name
An RSVP graphic card for the inauguration visible in one frame ('Join us January 1st, 2026 for the Inauguration of a New Era')
frames.presentation_style: Inspirational campaign narrative shifting from archival history to present-day movement energy; rallies shown as civic continuation of historical legacy

on_screen_text: Join us January 1st, 2026 for the Inauguration of a New Era.
RSVP at the link in bio.
frames.setting: Outdoor shot of City Hall Plaza (visible behind the RSVP graphic); final frames show a designed seal/badge graphic on cream and white backgrounds
visual_elements: NYC Inauguration 2026 badge: apple shape with 'N.Y.C. INAUGURATION 2026' in red and navy blue with gold border
City Hall building visible in background
White subtitle caption: 'This is not my victory.'
RSVP event card design with italic text
Clean, designed badge displayed prominently at end
frames.presentation_style: Closes with a designed inauguration promotional graphic; combines personal humility statement with civic branding for a public event

summary.dominant_setting: Archival black-and-white NYC footage transitioning to campaign rally scenes and City Hall exterior
visual_themes: Historical continuity with past NYC mayors
Campaign rally energy and crowd support
